editorsPicks.title: 奥德赛
editorsPicks.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
editorsPicks.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,

editorsPicks.title: 夺命旅程
editorsPicks.summary: 一群朋友搭便车前往得克萨斯州的ACL音乐节，司机安静却充满磁性。但当人们开始神秘消失时，有一件事变得明确：并非所有人都能抵达奥斯汀。《杀途》是一部不遗余力的得克萨斯公路恐怖惊悚片，将一场无忧无虑的节日之旅变成了一场噩梦和某种截然不同的东西。
editorsPicks.summaryEn: On the way to a Texas music festival, a group of friends catches a ride with a magnetic van driver. But when people start vanishing, the real headliner becomes survival.

comingSoon.title: 安昂传奇：最后的气宗
comingSoon.summary: 派拉蒙和尼克宣布“降世神通”系列开发三部新的电影，仍是动画形式。第一部由《降世神通：最后的气宗》导演Lauren Montgomery执导，《最后的气宗》主创Bryan Konietzko和Michael DiMartino担任制片人。
comingSoon.summaryEn: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls i

comingSoon.title: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
comingSoon.summary: 重建普通生活后，彼得一边在大学完成学业、一边从事兼职以维持生计，同时仍肩负着守护纽约街头的蜘蛛侠责任。然而，当一个神秘力量从内部腐蚀这座城市的安全与秩序，彼得被迫再次披上战衣。他必须在强大的敌人与昔日纽带之间找到平衡，并重新定义英雄的意义。
comingSoon.summaryEn: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to

trending.title: 后室
trending.summary: 一位心理治疗师的病人，在一次诡异的事故中“切入”到了一个超越现实的奇异维度。为了带回病人，这位治疗师不得不亲自踏入那片无边无际、充满黄色壁纸和嗡嗡荧光灯响声的未知迷宫。
trending.summaryEn: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.
